title: Make RCA required by default for feedback-backed evaluations
description:
## Summary
Make RCA required by default for feedback-backed evaluations.

## Deliverables
- RCA is enabled by default in feedback-backed evaluation flows.
- Disabling RCA becomes an explicit special option rather than the normal path.
- The default behavior reflects that RCA is required process output.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing RCA default-on behavior across feedback-backed evaluation entry points; disabling RCA remains explicit opt-out only.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented RCA-required default behavior across feedback-backed paths by making RCA stage mandatory in command flow and fatal on RCA-stage errors. MCP synchronous feedback response now refreshes final evaluation payload after CLI exit to include finalized RCA/status.
